caribbean.headline: Small Craft Advisory Issued for Turks and Caicos Waters
caribbean.paragraph: Turks and Caicos is experiencing sustained winds of 21 knots with wave heights reaching 7.0 feet and a dominant north swell period of 13 seconds, prompting a Small Craft Advisory. Rain chances are elevated up to 75 percent, while San Juan sees lighter winds near 11 knots with less significant marine impacts.

mediterranean.headline: Istanbul Faces Heavy Rain with Light Winds and Calm Seas
mediterranean.paragraph: Istanbul is experiencing persistent heavy rain with a 100% probability today, accompanied by light winds reaching up to 17 knots and wave heights around 1.0 foot from the northeast. Conditions remain calm with a short 3-second swell period, posing minimal impact to marine operations despite the steady precipitation.
